html:
Exclusive to:

“Contains a gem-shaped socket.”

-

The Cratered Moonrock is a craftable Don't Starve Together item, introduced in A New Reign. It is available in the Refined Materials Filter and requires an Alchemy Engine to craft.

Its only purpose is to act as a socket for Gems, turning it into a Moonlens. The Iridescent Gem cannot be socketed.

Usage

Trivia

  • Cratered Moonrocks were introduced in the East or West, Base is Best update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

"A rock for marking your territory."

Exclusive to:
“I should stick something shiny in it. For research.”
–Wilson
“Great. A rock with a hole in it.”
–Willow
“Rock from moon has hole. Like a cheese!”
–Wolfgang
“It's useless and missing a piece, much like me.”
–Wendy
“REQUIRES PLUGIN”
–WX-78
“Would make a useful cartographic instrument with proper embellishments.”
–Wickerbottom
“I think it's missing something.”
–Woodie
“This will make a decent magical vessel.”
–Maxwell
“Mani's gift may have söme use yet!”
–Wigfrid
“Haha. It's heavy!”
–Webber
“An eye without an iris.”
–Warly
“Big bump in it”
–Wormwood
“A rock with a hole in it.”
–Winona
“It might be an eye, were gems in supply.”
–Wortox
“Rock need pretty decoration!”
–Wurt
“I feel like it's looking at me.”
–Walter
“Now, have I seen any gems lying about?”
–Wanda
“Contains a gem-shaped socket.”
-
The Cratered Moonrock is a craftable Don't Starve Together item, introduced in A New Reign. It is available in the Refined Materials Filter and requires an Alchemy Engine to craft.
Its only purpose is to act as a socket for Gems, turning it into a Moonlens. The Iridescent Gem cannot be socketed.
Usage[edit | edit source]
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Cratered Moonrocks were introduced in the East or West, Base is Best update.

title: Cratered Moonrock

|webber = Haha. It's heavy!

The '''Cratered Moonrock''' is a craftable ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' item, introduced in ''[[A New Reign]]''. It is available in the [[Refined Materials Filter]] and requires an [[Alchemy Engine]] to craft.

Its only purpose is to act as a socket for [[Gems]], turning it into a [[Moonlens]]. The [[Iridescent Gem]] cannot be socketed.

=={{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Cratered Moonrock
|item2 = Blue Gem
|tool = Hand
|result = Blue Moonlens}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Cratered Moonrock
|item2 = Red Gem
|tool = Hand
|result = Red Moonlens}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Cratered Moonrock
|item2 = Purple Gem
|tool = Hand
|result = Purple Moonlens}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Cratered Moonrock
|item2 = Orange Gem
|tool = Hand
|result = Orange Moonlens}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Cratered Moonrock
|item2 = Green Gem
|tool = Hand
|result = Green Moonlens}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Cratered Moonrock
|item2 = Yellow Gem
|tool = Hand
|result = Yellow Moonlens}}

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Cratered Moonrocks were introduced in the ''[[A New Reign#August 11, 2016 - East or West, Base is Best|East or West, Base is Best]]'' update.

{{Craftable Items}}
